text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, not long before Grass Wonder's debut
race...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to the training course to get everything set
up before Grass Wonder arrives. But when I
arrive...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Whew... That'll do.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: All warmed up and ready! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Okay... let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Dashing off with a seemingly effortless burst of
blinding speed is Maruzensky, an Umamusume
who has earned herself countless epithets.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I've seen her on TV, in magazines, and online plenty of times before, but seeing her run in person... Her form is breathtaking.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe! That was fantabulous!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since she tends to take an immediate lead in her
races, Maruzensky is generally classified as a
front runner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it seems like less of a conscious strategy, and
more that she's so impossibly fast, no one else
can get ahead of her.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: All revved up... so now I floor it!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
A fearsome "Beast," through and through. She's
well-deserving of the nickname.
choice_data_list: Grass! I didn't know you were here.
Grass! I didn't know you were here.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I just arrived, actually. I'm ready to begin at your
earliest convenience.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
We don't have time to waste on gazing in
admiration.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Let us focus squarely on our own efforts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder's fighting spirit burns bright and
never wavers, not even in the presence of the
Beast.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I conduct her training with a strengthened sense
of purpose to help get her to the very top.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On another day...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder joins a scrimmage with other
Umamusume scheduled to debut the same time as
her.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Pant...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: W-wow... Grass's acceleration is incredible!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Talk about scary.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
When she gets that "gotcha!" look in her eyes,
Grass is the last person I want to be up against...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Really? That look gets me fired up!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, most of us aren't masochists, unlike you.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué dices?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Only 200 left! Grass is leading!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder leaves the rest of the competition
in the dust and takes first place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
1,600 meters of turf in just a minute and
thirty-four seconds... It's hard to believe this is
the work of a junior-year racer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The reporters who came to the scrimmage also
take notice of Grass Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Hooooly moly... Fantastic! What was her name
again?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: It's Grass Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't be happier seeing you enjoy this
scrimmage between the up-and-coming
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Symboli Rudolf! I was able to capture so
many great pictures today! Especially of that last
runner!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Who in this generation has the most potential in
your eyes?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, it goes without saying that every
Umamusume has a great deal of potential.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
For one, there's El Condor Pasa. She proudly
claims to be the world's strongest racer, and
makes an inspiring amount of effort to keep
improving.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Then there's Seiun Sky. She tends to stay out of
the spotlight, but once she's on the track, you see
just how many tricks are up her sleeve.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Another one of note is Special Week. Despite the
challenges she seems to be facing adjusting to her
new surroundings, no one can deny the brilliance
of her skill.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Mhm! Right, right! Those names have all come up
a lot recently!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure they have. But let's not forget Grass
Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Oh! The Umamusume from the race just now!
Which reminds me...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
One minute and thirty-four seconds over a
distance of 1600 meters... That's the same as a
certain record performance at the Asahi Hai F.S.!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Surely nobody could see that time and not be
reminded of the legendary Beast, Maruzensky!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Now that you mention it, the similarities are
quite the remarkable coincidence.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah! And you know what that means?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder could be the next Maruzensky! You
could even go so far as to call her the "Beast's
Successor"!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Graaass! Great race! Your time was amazing!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Grass?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: The... "Beast's Successor," you say?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
I sure do! Everyone in the media booth was saying
so after seeing her race today! She's got what it
takes to live up to those expectations!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky is so dominant that just saying her
name brings so many legendary moments to mind.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
And just between us, it was precisely that "Hot
Rod" who inspired me to become a huge
Umamusume fan!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Quite understandable.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Not only is she undefeated, but in just eight races
since her debut, she achieved an unprecedented
sum of 61 lengths in their combined margins of
victory.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That commanding lead has inspired people to
refer to her races as "solo journeys," giving her
such an intimidating reputation...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...it's even resulted in Umamusume withdrawing
from their scheduled races just because they
know Maruzensky will be entering.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
I know, right?! I heard they almost had to cancel a
race 'cause there weren't enough participants!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
It's good that it didn't come to that, but even so...
The fact that she's never found herself in a race
with a double-digit racer count is a crazy feat in
its own right!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
That's why people started calling her the Beast in
the first place... But now, Grass Wonder has
entered the picture!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Hmm.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: She's already this strong, and she hasn't even debuted yet! Heck, she hasn't even been scouted yet!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
And what's more, she's got that unshakable
serene confidence! She makes her wins look so
effortless, other racers can't hope to compete!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
She's right up there with Maruzensky! I think the
Beast's Successor would be the perfect nickname
for her!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You make an intriguing point.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As you might surmise from my naming her as an
example, I also have high hopes for Grass
Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But I say that because...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hey Grass, are you going back to the dorm after
this? We could go togeth—

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Spe, but I can't.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to drop by the gym, so please go on
ahead without me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: H... huh?! You're going to the gym at this hour?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But I say that because...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder herself carries unyielding
determination to reach the top.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...The Beast's Successor.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I should feel honored to be mentioned in the
same breath as her. But...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The title of "Successor" isn't suitable for one who
stands at the top.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I could never be content with it.
